name: OpenClaw G2
tagline: Private OpenClaw companion for Even Realities G2.
description: A thin Even Hub client that sends concise prompts to a paired OpenClaw relay and displays HUD-safe replies on Even Realities G2 glasses.
author: Plinko Solutions

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connects to your paired OpenClaw relay for pairing, refresh, and prompt requests.
